source.body_text_sample:
Skip to main content
PEOPLE SERVICES ABOUT US CAREERS CONTACT ACCOUNT PAYMENTS
CAREERS
TRAILBLAZERS ARE WELCOME HERE

Recruiting bright and highly motivated legal professionals is essential to the continued success of our firm. But that’s not enough for us. We’re focused on attracting candidates who also show an entrepreneurial spirit, leadership qualities, and strong business acumen. What we offer in return is an opportunity to join a talented and diverse team with broad experience in providing legal assistance on personal and business matters of all kinds.

We have the breadth and swagger of a larger firm, but adopt a personal and team approach as we work together on meaningful and interesting projects.  You belong here if you’re ready to be part of an engaging and dynamic work environment—one that fosters ongoing professional development, career excellence, and a strong sense of community.

Interested candidates are encouraged to submit a cover letter, salary expectations and CV to Human Resources.

EMPLOYMENT LAWYER

We are looking for a driven and experienced Employment Lawyer with a minimum of five years’ experience. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in employment law with an emphasis on employer-side advice, and experience with employment litigation. You will work collaboratively with our corporate, private wealth, tax, litigation, and real estate teams to ensure the best outcomes and highest standards for our clients.
